Engineering Onboarding Guide

Welcome to the Engineering team! This guide covers your first two weeks. Week 1: Set up your development environment using the DevSetup script in the Platform repo. Install Docker, configure VPN, and request access to Azure DevOps. Your buddy is assigned by your manager.
